commands.review_summary:
Adds a `pdf.password` tool parameter, threads it through PDF fallback extraction and the bundled document-extract plugin, rejects passwords on native PDF providers, updates docs, and adds focused tests.

PR surface: Source +39, Tests +116, Docs +18. Total +173 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature PR rather than a broken existing behavior report. The branch has mocked tests for the new path, but no live encrypted-PDF reproduction or after-fix run.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blockers are maintainer API approval and contributor real-behavior proof, not a narrow ClawSweeper code repair.

target.title: feat: support encrypted PDF extraction
target.body:
## Summary

- Add a `password` parameter to the PDF tool for encrypted PDFs in extraction fallback mode.
- Thread PDF passwords through the document extraction request, core media wrapper, and `clawpdf`-backed document-extract plugin.
- Reject `password` with native PDF providers, where provider APIs do not expose an OpenClaw password contract.

## Verification

- `pnpm test src/media/pdf-extract.test.ts extensions/document-extract/document-extractor.test.ts src/agents/tools/pdf-tool.test.ts src/agents/tools/pdf-tool.helpers.test.ts`
- `pnpm format:docs:check -- docs/tools/pdf.md`
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check extensions/document-extract/document-extractor.ts extensions/document-extract/document-extractor.test.ts src/agents/tools/pdf-tool.ts src/agents/tools/pdf-tool.test.ts src/media/document-extractors.runtime.ts src/media/pdf-extract.ts src/media/pdf-extract.test.ts src/plugins/document-extractor-types.ts`
- `/Users/steipete/Projects/agent-scripts/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` clean

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: encrypted PDF fallback extraction can receive an exact password string, while native provider mode rejects unsupported password usage clearly.
Real environment tested: local macOS checkout plus focused mocked PDF-tool/plugin tests.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `pnpm test src/media/pdf-extract.test.ts extensions/document-extract/document-extractor.test.ts src/agents/tools/pdf-tool.test.ts src/agents/tools/pdf-tool.helpers.test.ts`.
Evidence after fix: focused PDF extraction/tool/plugin test shards passed on rebased branch `b1f2db3ee4`.
Observed result after fix: password propagation, whitespace preservation, native-provider rejection, and `clawpdf` password-error normalization are covered.
What was not tested: live encrypted PDF analysis against a real model provider.
target.author: steipete
